name: Nana Hayashida
description:
A second year student and Banri and Kouko's senior in the Festival Research Society.  Her nickname Linda (りんだ) is an alternate reading of the kanji for Hayashida (林田).   

~!Banri's love interest and best-friend during High School, she now follows him and keeps an eye out for him, though he cannot remember her at all. For reasons unknown as yet, she has not told him about their shared past.!~
